payload.content: If the question uses a specialized term (e.g., a film genre, a medical condition, a legal status, a sports league name) that is not defined by any retrieved passage, briefly define the term using common knowledge before connecting hop-2 evidence to the question.

rationale: Mirror of HoVer mdk_term_definition. HotpotQA's GEPA summarize2 has 'leverage implicit domain knowledge' implicitly; this feature isolates the term-definition-before-reasoning discipline as a single rule.
